description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black and gray color scheme. The handguard is elongated and vented, likely for heat dissipation, and is finished in a light gray tone, contrasting with the darker receiver and stock. The rifle has a prominent pistol grip and a fixed, angular stock at the rear, providing ergonomic support for the user. The top of the receiver appears to have a rail system, possibly for mounting optics or other accessories, while the front end is equipped with a distinctive muzzle device. The trigger guard is integrated into the lower receiver, and the magazine well is visible but the magazine itself is not present. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary urban tactical rifles.
description: A modern, black and gray tactical rifle with a vented handguard, fixed stock, and rail system for accessories. The design is sleek and ergonomic, with visible metal and polymer components.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, highlighting the muzzle device and the symmetry of the handguard.
description_view_1: A left-side profile view shows the full length of the rifle, including the vented handguard, pistol grip, and fixed stock.
description_view_2: The rear view focuses on the stock and the back of the receiver, with the handguard and barrel extending away.
description_view_3: A right-side profile view, similar to view 1, but showing the opposite side of the handguard, receiver, and stock.
